source.authority: Government Gazette of the Republic of Namibia
source.scope: Official-gazette-backed Namibia individual normal-tax schedule for years of assessment 2025 through 2027 on caller-confirmed annual taxable income.

NA.notes: Annual individual normal tax under the enacted 0%, 18%, 25%, 28%, 30%, 32% and 37% Schedule 4 bands. Taxable-income derivation and employee-tax administration remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Namibian years of assessment 2025 through 2027 individual normal tax on caller-confirmed annual taxable income.
